title: Thoughts and Things 7.25.2025 — pre-Austin pre-move existential
html:
TL;DR

  • July 26 2025 late-night journal ~6 weeks before Austin move — "I am moving 2090 miles away, 31-hour car ride from home. My parents are getting older. My brother is getting older. I am getting older."
  • Pattern-recognition: the Austin move feels like the 6 month abroad — "the plan was an outline and the next step was determined on the spot." Same dad-conflict pattern: pre-India dad voiced "discontentment about me not sharing and taking input on my plan"; same conversation reran this week pre-Austin.
  • Core mission line — high-density: "My mom will have to work 7 days a week until she dies with the things she has allowed and chosen for her life. My dad will side gig and finesse until he dies. I am the one that will need to break this... I am willing to drown." The mom house mission in raw form.
  • Tension: "sacrifices may be counterproductive — my parents want to see me spend time with me." The loneliness arc's family-cost variant.
  • Status check: "I am moving to Austin but still missing many critical pieces — an income, a place to stay, what will I actually do once I'm there." The doc cuts off mid-sentence ("the sacrufues i am mentioning are con-").

Notes

This is one of the cleanest single-doc statements of the family as hidden runway inversion: the family isn't his runway, he is theirs. The line "I have always known that I am the one meant to do this" connects directly to the older brother as anchor role he plays for Ayden and the lineage as fate frame that recurs across his 2024-2025 reflections.

The repeat-conversation-with-dad insight is meta: pre-India (2023) and pre-Austin (2025), same script. "I am trying to solo run it, and I will, but getting insights and help from people that want to help is the meta." That's a real shift — naming the solo grinder reflex as a default rather than virtue.

Sits one week before the IRL Lore PRD and ~7 weeks before the alone in Austin doc — the lead-in to the loneliest stretch of the founder loneliness arc.

Connections

  • mom house by the river goal — the mission this doc articulates in source form
  • family as hidden runway — the inversion
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 — the arc this lives in
  • shanghai study abroad · india — the pattern-precedents Yahir invokes
  • austin move · 2025 09 20 on austin arrival — the next chapters
  • ayden · mom yahir — the family stakes
